name: read_file
description: Read the contents of a file from disk

name: write_file
description: Write or overwrite a file on disk

name: list_dir
description: List files and subdirectories in a directory

name: search_files
description: Search for files matching a regex pattern

name: delete_file
description: Delete a file or directory

name: move_file
description: Move or rename a file

name: run_command
description: Execute a shell command in a subprocess

name: run_script
description: Run a Python or shell script file

name: kill_process
description: Kill a running background process by PID

name: run_tests
description: Run the project test suite

name: lint_code
description: Run a linter on source code files

name: format_code
description: Auto-format source code with a formatter

name: check_types
description: Run static type checker on TypeScript or Python

name: generate_diff
description: Generate a unified diff between two files

name: gh_list_repos
description: List GitHub repositories for a user or org

name: gh_create_issue
description: Create a new GitHub issue with title and body

name: gh_read_file
description: Read a file from a GitHub repository

name: gh_push_commit
description: Push a commit to a GitHub repository branch

name: gh_list_prs
description: List open pull requests in a repository

name: gh_merge_pr
description: Merge a pull request

name: slack_send
description: Send a message to a Slack channel

name: slack_list
description: List recent messages in a Slack channel

name: email_send
description: Send an email via SMTP

name: db_query
description: Execute a SQL SELECT query on a database

name: db_insert
description: Insert a new row into a database table

name: db_update
description: Update existing rows in a database table

name: db_delete
description: Delete rows from a database table

name: http_get
description: Make an HTTP GET request to a URL

name: http_post
description: Make an HTTP POST request with JSON body

name: browser_open
description: Open a URL in a headless browser

name: browser_click
description: Click an element on a browser page

name: browser_type
description: Type text into a browser form field

name: browser_screenshot
description: Take a screenshot of the current browser page

name: browser_extract
description: Extract and return text content from a page

name: remember
description: Save information to persistent memory store

name: search_memory
description: Search persistent memory for relevant information

name: read_memory
description: Read a specific memory entry by ID

name: llm_complete
description: Call an LLM to complete or generate text

name: embed_text
description: Generate vector embeddings for a text string

name: get_config
description: Read application configuration values

name: set_config
description: Write application configuration values

name: list_tools
description: List all available MCP tools in this session

name: create_branch
description: Create a new git branch

name: git_status
description: Get the current git repository status

name: git_log
description: View commit history of a git repository

name: docker_run
description: Run a Docker container

name: docker_build
description: Build a Docker image from a Dockerfile

name: cron_schedule
description: Schedule a recurring task with cron

name: notify_send
description: Send a desktop or push notification

name: translate_text
description: Translate text between languages
